---
title: "CNV calculations"
author: "Trish"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see <http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com>.

When you click the **Knit** button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:



```{r calling libraries}
library(tidyverse)
library(RTCGA)
library(RTCGA.CNV)
library(BiocManager)
library(GenomicRanges)
library(generics)
library(BiocGenerics)
library(S4Vectors)
library(IRanges)
library(Seqinfo)
library(devtools)
library(data.table)
library(here)
library(patchwork)

```


```{r calling in CNV segment files for each sample}

Ascites2.rmdup <- read.delim("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/cfDNApipe/using 6 cancer and 7 normal data samples June1/CNV plots/Ascites2-rmdup.cns")

Ascites3.rmdup <- read.delim("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/cfDNApipe/using 6 cancer and 7 normal data samples June1/CNV plots/Ascites3-rmdup.cns")

Ascites4.rmdup <- read.delim("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/cfDNApipe/using 6 cancer and 7 normal data samples June1/CNV plots/Ascites4-rmdup.cns")

Ascites5.rmdup <- read.delim("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/cfDNApipe/using 6 cancer and 7 normal data samples June1/CNV plots/Ascites5-rmdup.cns")

Ascites6.rmdup <- read.delim("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/cfDNApipe/using 6 cancer and 7 normal data samples June1/CNV plots/Ascites6-rmdup.cns")

Ascites7.rmdup <- read.delim("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/cfDNApipe/using 6 cancer and 7 normal data samples June1/CNV plots/Ascites7-rmdup.cns")

PF12.rmdup <- read.delim("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/cfDNApipe/using 6 cancer and 7 normal data samples June1/CNV plots/PF12-rmdup.cns")

PF13.rmdup <- read.delim("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/cfDNApipe/using 6 cancer and 7 normal data samples June1/CNV plots/PF13-rmdup.cns")

PF15.rmdup <- read.delim("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/cfDNApipe/using 6 cancer and 7 normal data samples June1/CNV plots/PF15-rmdup.cns")

PF19.rmdup <- read.delim("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/cfDNApipe/using 6 cancer and 7 normal data samples June1/CNV plots/PF19-rmdup.cns")

PF26.rmdup <- read.delim("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/cfDNApipe/using 6 cancer and 7 normal data samples June1/CNV plots/PF26-rmdup.cns")

PF29.rmdup <- read.delim("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/cfDNApipe/using 6 cancer and 7 normal data samples June1/CNV plots/PF29-rmdup.cns")

PF32.rmdup <- read.delim("C:/Users/pquin/OneDrive - National University of Ireland, Galway/Research Project/cfDNApipe/using 6 cancer and 7 normal data samples June1/CNV plots/PF32-rmdup.cns")

```

```{r manipulating files}


#adding sample name to each file
CNS_files <- ls(pattern = "^Ascites|^PF")

for (name in CNS_files) {
  df <- get(name)
  df$CNS_source <- name
  assign(name, df)
  
}

rm(df)
rm(name)


#labelling each ascites file as cancer
Ascites_files <- ls(pattern = "^Ascites")

for (name in Ascites_files) {
  df <- get(name)
  df$treatment <- "cancer"
  assign(name, df)
  
  
} 

rm(df)
rm(name)

#labelling each plasma file as control
PF_files <- ls(pattern = "^PF")

for (name in PF_files) {
  df <- get(name)
  df$treatment <- "control"
  assign(name, df)
  
} 

rm(df)
rm(name)

#removing columns not needed for CNV analysis
for (name in CNS_files) {
  df <- get(name)
  df <- df[ , !colnames(df) %in% c("gene","depth","probes", "weight")]
  assign(name,df)
}

rm(df)
rm(name)

all_CNS_files_df <- CNS_files %>%
  set_names() %>%
  map(get) %>%
  bind_rows()

all_CNS_files_df <- all_CNS_files_df %>%
  filter(chromosome %in% paste0("chr", 1:22)) %>%
  mutate(chrom = as.integer(str_remove(chromosome, "chr")), 
         sample = CNS_source) %>%
  select(sample, treatment, chrom, start, end, log2)
  




```

```{r getting info from reference genome hg38}

cytoband_url <- "http://hgdownload.soe.ucsc.edu/goldenPath/hg38/database/cytoBand.txt.gz"
cytoband <- read_tsv(cytoband_url,
                     col_names = c("chrom", "start", "end", "name", "giestain"), show_col_types = FALSE)

#just keeping the autosomes
cytoband <- cytoband %>%
  filter(chrom %in% paste0("chr", 1:22))

#Getting centromere boundaries
centromeres <- cytoband %>%
  filter(giestain == "acen") %>%
  group_by(chrom) %>%
  summarise(
    p_arm_end = min(start),
    q_arm_start = max(end)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
    mutate(chrom = as.integer(str_remove(chrom, "chr")))

#Getting chromosome sizes
chrom_size_url <- "http://hgdownload.soe.ucsc.edu/goldenPath/hg38/database/chromInfo.txt.gz"
chrom_size <- read_tsv(chrom_size_url,
                       col_names = c("chrom", "size", "filename"),
                       show_col_types = FALSE)

chrom_size <- chrom_size %>%
  filter(chrom %in% paste0("chr", 1:22)) %>%
  mutate(chrom = as.integer(str_remove(chrom, "chr"))) %>%
  dplyr::select(chrom, size)

#building the arms dataframe
    
arms_df <- centromeres %>%
  left_join(chrom_size, by = "chrom") %>%
  mutate(
    p_start = 1,
    p_end = p_arm_end,
    q_start = q_arm_start,
    q_end = size) %>%
  dplyr::select(chrom, p_start, p_end, q_start, q_end) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = -chrom, 
    names_to = c("arm", ".value"),
    names_sep = "_") %>%
  mutate(arm = paste0(chrom, arm)) %>%
  dplyr::select(chrom, arm, start, end)
    
    
  

```

```{r setting thresholds}

gain_threshold <- 0.3
loss_threshold <- -0.3

all_CNS_files_df <- all_CNS_files_df %>%
  mutate(
    cnv_type = case_when(
      log2 > gain_threshold ~ "gain",
      log2 < loss_threshold ~ "loss",
      TRUE ~ "neutral"))# %>%
  #filter(cnv_type != "neutral")


```

```{r mapping our files to chromosome arms}
gr_segs <- GRanges(
  seqnames = all_CNS_files_df$chrom,
  ranges = IRanges(start = all_CNS_files_df$start, 
                   end = all_CNS_files_df$end),
  sample = all_CNS_files_df$sample, 
  cnv_type = all_CNS_files_df$cnv_type,
treatment = all_CNS_files_df$treatment,
log2 = all_CNS_files_df$log2)

gr_arms <- GRanges(
  seqnames = arms_df$chrom,
  ranges = IRanges(start = arms_df$start, end = arms_df$end),
  arm = arms_df$arm)
```

```{r calculating hits and overlaps}

hits <- findOverlaps(gr_arms, gr_segs)

arm_segment_overlaps <- tibble(
  arm_index = queryHits(hits),
  segment_index = subjectHits(hits),
  arm = mcols(gr_arms)$arm[queryHits(hits)],
  sample = mcols(gr_segs)$sample[subjectHits(hits)],
  treatment = mcols(gr_segs)$treatment[subjectHits(hits)],
  segment_log2 = mcols(gr_segs)$log2[subjectHits(hits)],
  overlap_bp = width(
    pintersect(
      gr_arms[queryHits(hits)],
      gr_segs[subjectHits(hits)]
    )
  )
)
#calculating arm values
arm_values <- arm_segment_overlaps %>%
  group_by(sample, treatment, arm) %>%
  summarise(
    arm_log2 = weighted.mean(
      segment_log2,
      w = overlap_bp,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    covered_bp = sum(overlap_bp), 
    .groups = "drop"
  )

chrlevels <- arms_df %>%
  arrange(chrom, start) %>%
  pull(arm)

```



```{r changing arm values to z scores}

control_reference <- arm_values %>%
  filter(treatment == "control") %>%
  group_by(arm) %>%
  summarise(
    control_mean = mean(arm_log2, na.rm = TRUE),
    control_sd = sd(arm_log2, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


arm_zscores <- arm_values %>%
  left_join(control_reference, by = "arm") %>%
  mutate(
    z = if_else(
      is.finite(control_sd) & control_sd > 0,
      (arm_log2 - control_mean) / control_sd,
      NA_real_
    ),
    call = case_when(
       z >= 3 ~ "gain",
       z <= -3 ~ "loss", 
       TRUE ~ "neutral"
     ),
    
    arm = factor(arm, levels = rev(chrlevels))
  )

#increased standardisation to allow for small number of samples
control_reference_robust <- arm_values %>%
  filter(treatment == "control")%>%
  group_by(arm)%>%
  summarise(
    control_median = median(arm_log2, na.rm = TRUE),
    control_mad = mad(
      arm_log2, 
      center = control_median,
      constant = 1.4826, 
      na.rm = TRUE
    ), .groups = "drop"
  )

 arm_zscores <- arm_values %>%
   left_join(control_reference_robust, by = "arm") %>%
   mutate(
     z = if_else(
       is.finite(control_mad) & control_mad > 0,
       (arm_log2 - control_median) / control_mad, NA_real_
     ),
     call = case_when(
       z >= 3 ~ "gain",
       z <= -3 ~ "loss", 
       TRUE ~ "neutral"
     ),
     arm = factor(arm, levels = rev(chrlevels))
   )
 

  
  

```

```{r plotting (2nd attempt)}

cnv_plot_data <- arm_zscores %>%
  mutate(
    treatment = recode(
      treatment, 
      cancer = "Ovarian cancer", 
      control = "Noncancer"
    )
  )

cnv_plot <- ggplot(
  cnv_plot_data,
  aes(x = z, y = arm, colour = call)
) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.25) +
  geom_point(
    size = 1.8, 
    alpha = 0.85, 
    position = position_jitter(height = 0.08, width = 0)
  ) +
  facet_grid(. ~ treatment) +
  scale_colour_manual(
    values = c(
      gain = "red", 
      loss = "blue"
      #neutral = "purple"
    )
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    limits = c(-10, 10),
    oob = scales::squish, 
    breaks = c(-10, 0, 10)
  ) +
  labs(x = "Chromosome-arm z-score", y = NULL) + 
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none", 
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text.x = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7)
  )

cnv_plot
```

```{r importing data from TCGA}
data("OV.CNV")

tcga_samples <- tibble(sample = unique(OV.CNV$Sample))%>%
mutate(sample_type = substr(sample,14,15))

tumour_samples <- tcga_samples %>%
  filter(sample_type =="01") %>%
  pull(sample)

tcga_cnv <- OV.CNV %>%
  filter(Sample %in% tumour_samples) %>%
  transmute(
    chrom = Chromosome, 
    start = Start,
    end = End,
    sample = Sample,
    log2 = Segment_Mean
  ) %>%
 filter(
   chrom %in% 1:22,
   !is.na(start),
   !is.na(end),
   !is.na(log2)
    )
  
  #filter(cnv_type != "neutral")


gr_tcga <- GRanges(
  seqnames = tcga_cnv$chrom,
  ranges = IRanges(start = tcga_cnv$start, end = tcga_cnv$end), 
  sample = tcga_cnv$sample,
  log2 = tcga_cnv$log2
)

olaps_tcga <- findOverlaps(gr_arms, gr_tcga) 

tcga_arm_overlaps <- tibble(
  arm = mcols(gr_arms)$arm[queryHits(olaps_tcga)],
  sample = mcols(gr_tcga)$sample[subjectHits(olaps_tcga)],
  segment_log2 = mcols(gr_tcga)$log2[subjectHits(olaps_tcga)],
  overlap_bp = width(
    pintersect(
      gr_arms[queryHits(olaps_tcga)],
      gr_tcga[subjectHits(olaps_tcga)]
    )
  )
)

#calculating one weighted CNV per sample per chromosome arm

tcga_arm_values <- tcga_arm_overlaps %>%
  filter(
    arm %in% chrlevels, 
    overlap_bp > 0,
  ) %>%
  group_by(sample, arm) %>%
  summarise(
    arm_log2 = weighted.mean(
      segment_log2,
      w = overlap_bp,
      na.rm = TRUE
    ),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    cnv_type = case_when(
      arm_log2 > 0.3 ~ "gain",
      arm_log2 < 0.3 ~ "loss",
      TRUE ~ "neutral"
    )
  )

n_tcga <- n_distinct(tcga_cnv$sample)

tcga_arm_freq <- tcga_arm_values %>%
  filter(cnv_type != "neutral") %>%
  count(arm, cnv_type, name = "n")%>%
  tidyr::complete(
    arm = chrlevels,
    cnv_type = c("gain", "loss"),
    fill = list(n=0)
  ) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = cnv_type,
    values_from = n,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    gain_freq = gain/n_tcga,
    loss_freq = loss/n_tcga,
    loss_neg = -loss_freq,
    arm = factor(arm, levels = rev(chrlevels))
  )

```


```{r continuation of 2nd attempt plotting}

p_tcga <- ggplot(tcga_arm_freq, aes(y = arm)) +
  geom_col(aes(x = loss_neg), fill = "blue", width = 0.7) +
  geom_col(aes(x = gain_freq), fill = "red", width = 0.7) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.25) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1, 1), 
                     breaks = c(-1,-0.5, 0, 0.5, 1.0)) +
  
  labs(title = paste0( "TCGA Ovarian Cancers\n(n = 597)"),
       x = "Fraction of samples",
       y = NULL) +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 7),
    plot.title = element_text(
      face = "bold",
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = 9
    )
  )

p_tcga


```

```{r overall plot}

overall_plot <- 
  p_tcga + cnv_plot+
  plot_layout(widths = c(1.15, 2.4)) &
  theme(plot.margin = margin(5, 5, 5, 5))

overall_plot

ggsave("combined_cnv_plot.png")


`
```
